comments: Substantive content: 'CNN is picking up Toronto' vs 'seeing it...it's picking up drama'
Misheard proper name: 'TV hall' instead of 'view of the TV'
Dropped line: 'I want boy to get in the picture.'
Misheard/substituted proper names: 'Do Good' instead of 'Birdie'
Minor rewording: 'Merry Christmas' instead of 'say Merry Christmas'
Omission: 'This is great timing. Ok, Ben, Ben, Do Good's watching. Ok? I don't want you to freak out.'
